creator: jhell@DataIX.net
text:
On 12/06/2010 18:33, Pete French wrote:
>> Fix:
> 	Workaround is to install 7.3 and then upgrade to 8.1, but it is
> 	not ideal.
> 
> 

Or boot into your BIOS and change one of the CDROM/DVD drives to an off
state so its not picked up by the install.

Given this is still a problem but at least you have two workarounds.

-- 

 jhell,v
